title: Aptus Value Housing Finance India Ltd ransomware incident

victim.name: Aptus Value Housing Finance India Ltd

extortion.description: Aptus Value Housing Finance India Ltd is a Home Loan Company. Aptus has been formed to primarily address the housing finance needs of self employed, belonging to Low and Middle Income Families primarily from semi urban and rural markets.•   Financial document, personal data and customer contracts. https://www.aptusindia.com/
